next_steps: Send stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation and electromyography (EMG)
Consult pediatric neurology and consider administration of BabyBIG (botulism immune globulin)
Send genetic testing for spinal muscular atrophy (SMN1 gene)
Maintain respiratory support and monitor for autonomic instability
Continue supportive care while awaiting definitive diagnostic results
